---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement to the delivery gate, CLI, or MCP surface
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature you want.

## Why it belongs in DoneGate MCP

Explain why this strengthens the delivery gate instead of turning the project into a broader PM or automation platform.

## Alternatives considered

What are you doing today instead?

## Additional context

Add examples, mock CLI usage, MCP tool ideas, or links to related issues.
